holdings.infoBox: MAGS is an equity ETF with a total of 23 individual holdings.

overview.description: The Roundhill Magnificent Seven ETF (MAGS) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in stocks based on a particular theme. The fund is an actively managed fund that offers highly concentrated exposure to the largest and most liquid leading technology stocks. The fund invests primarily through swaps and forwards. MAGS was launched on Apr 11, 2023 and is issued by Roundhill.
